name.full: Infovision Prompt Validator — AI Prompt Quality Tool

description.short: Validate and improve AI prompts by persona
description.full: Evaluate prompt quality against role-specific personas (Developer, PM, BA, Support). Get a 0-100 score, issues, and an AI-improved version instantly.

commands.title: validate
commands.description: Validate a prompt — usage: validate [persona:dev|pm|ba|support] Your prompt here

commands.title: improve
commands.description: Improve a prompt — usage: improve Your prompt here

commands.title: list personas
commands.description: Show all available personas and their criteria
